title: Elegant Plastic Serving Tray with Gold Rim and Handles, 36 cm, Round Decorative Platter
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Round serving tray featuring a luxurious gold-rimmed design with convenient handles, perfect for serving drinks and appetisers at parties
DIMENSIONS: 36 centimetres in diameter, offering ample space for arranging and presenting food, beverages, or decorative items
PRACTICAL FEATURES: Equipped with sturdy handles for secure grip and easy carrying, making it ideal for serving multiple guests
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for both casual family gatherings and formal entertaining, can be used as a decorative centrepiece or functional serving platter
EASY MAINTENANCE: Durable plastic construction ensures quick cleaning and lightweight handling for everyday use
description: Elevate your serving game with this sophisticated round decorative platter that seamlessly blends style and functionality. The 36 cm serving tray features an eye-catching gold rim that adds a touch of luxury to your table setting, whilst the practical handles ensure easy and secure carrying. Perfect for serving appetisers, desserts, or displaying decorative items, this versatile tray makes an elegant addition to any dining occasion. The durable plastic construction offers lightweight handling and easy maintenance, making it ideal for both casual gatherings and formal entertaining. Whether you're hosting a dinner party, afternoon tea, or simply want to add a decorative element to your home, this serving tray delivers both practicality and sophistication. The generous 36 cm diameter provides ample space for arranging your favourite dishes or creating stunning displays.
